message: 🌱 Add harbor: [Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize container vulner mission (#370)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-10496-feature-request-provide-a-ui-to-visualize-container-vulnerabilities",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: [Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize container vulnerabilities",
+    "description": "[Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize container vulnerabilities. This issue affects 34+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: [Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize container vulnerabilities"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nWhen trying to identify which containers within our registry contain vulnerabilities, it is frustrating to have to check every individual tag, within every individual registry, within every individual"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize container vulner",
+        "description": "Thank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\nThis PR aims to enable the Vulnerability Dashboard feature in Harbor \n\n# Issue being fixed\n\nCommunity Proposal: [Link](https://github.com/goharbor/community/pull/222)\n\nAdded the decision on the finalized approach to add th\n```yaml\ncurl -Ss --header \"authorization: Basic $AUTH\" -X GET \"$HARBOR_SERVER/api/v2.0/projects/$PROJECT_NAME/repositories/$REPO_NAME/artifacts\" | jq -r '.[].addition_links.vulnerabilities.href'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Feature Request] Provide a UI to visualize contai is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Thank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\nThis PR aims to enable the Vulnerability Dashboard feature in Harbor \n\n# Issue being fixed\n\nCommunity Proposal: [Link](https://github.com/goharbor/community/pull/222)\n\nAdded the decision on the finalized approach to add the feature is discussed in the community proposal: https://github.com/goharbor/community/pull/222. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "curl -Ss --header \"authorization: Basic $AUTH\" -X GET \"$HARBOR_SERVER/api/v2.0/projects/$PROJECT_NAME/repositories/$REPO_NAME/artifacts\" | jq -r '.[].addition_links.vulnerabilities.href'",
+        "ARTIFACT_PATH=$(curl -Ss --header \"authorization: Basic $AUTH\" -X GET \"${HARBOR_SERVER}/api/v2.0/projects/${PROJECT_NAME}/repositories/${REPO_NAME}/artifacts\" | jq -r '.[0].addition_links.vulnerabilities.href')",
+        "SCAN_RESULTS=$(curl -Ss --header \"authorization: Basic $AUTH\" -X GET \"${HARBOR_SERVER}${ARTIFACT_PATH}\")"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/10496",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/18732"
+    },
+    "reactions": 34,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
